{"commands": ["python3 - <<'PY'
import zipfile, xml.etree.ElementTree as ET
from pathlib import Path
p = Path('[EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT]')
ns = {'a':'http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/spreadsheetml/2006/main'}
with zipfile.ZipFile(p) as z:
    print('parts', sorted([n for n in z.namelist() if n.startswith('xl/') and n.endswith('.xml')])[:20])
    wb = ET.fromstring(z.read('xl/workbook.xml'))
    sheets = wb.find('a:sheets', ns)
    print('sheets', [s.attrib['name'] for s in sheets])
    styles = ET.fromstring(z.read('xl/styles.xml'))
    numfmts = styles.find('a:numFmts', ns)
    print('defined', [(n.attrib.get('numFmtId'), n.attrib.get('formatCode')) for n in (numfmts.findall('a:numFmt', ns) if numfmts is not None else [])])

commands:
python3 - <<'PY'
import zipfile, xml.etree.ElementTree as ET
from pathlib import Path
p = Path('[EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT]')
ns = {'a':'http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/spreadsheetml/2006/main'}
with zipfile.ZipFile(p) as z:
    print('parts', sorted([n for n in z.namelist() if n.startswith('xl/') and n.endswith('.xml')])[:20])
    wb = ET.fromstring(z.read('xl/workbook.xml'))
    sheets = wb.find('a:sheets', ns)
    print('sheets', [s.attrib['name'] for s in sheets])
    styles = ET.fromstring(z.read('xl/styles.xml'))
    numfmts = styles.find('a:numFmts', ns)
    print('defined', [(n.attrib.get('numFmtId'), n.attrib.get('formatCode')) for n in (numfmts.findall('a:numFmt', ns) if numfmts is not None else [])])
PY

python3 - <<'PY'
import zipfile, xml.etree.ElementTree as ET
ns = {'a':'http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/spreadsheetml/2006/main'}
with zipfile.ZipFile('[EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT]') as z:
    root = ET.fromstring(z.read('xl/worksheets/sheet2.xml'))
    for ref in ['H4','I4','K4','H5','I5','K5','H6','I6','K6','H7','I7','K7']:
        c = root.find(f".//a:c[@r='{ref}']", ns)
        f = c.find('a:f', ns)
        v = c.find('a:v', ns)
        print(ref, c.attrib.get('t'), f.text if f is not None else None, v.text if v is not None else None)
PY

commands:
python3 - <<'PY'
import zipfile, xml.etree.ElementTree as ET
from pathlib import Path
p = Path('[EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT]')
ns = {'a':'http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/spreadsheetml/2006/main'}
with zipfile.ZipFile(p) as z:
    print('parts', sorted([n for n in z.namelist() if n.startswith('xl/') and n.endswith('.xml')])[:20])
    wb = ET.fromstring(z.read('xl/workbook.xml'))
    sheets = wb.find('a:sheets', ns)
    print('sheets', [s.attrib['name'] for s in sheets])
    styles = ET.fromstring(z.read('xl/styles.xml'))
    numfmts = styles.find('a:numFmts', ns)
    print('defined', [(n.attrib.get('numFmtId'), n.attrib.get('formatCode')) for n in (numfmts.findall('a:numFmt', ns) if numfmts is not None else [])])
PY

python3 - <<'PY'
import zipfile, xml.etree.ElementTree as ET
ns = {'a':'http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/spreadsheetml/2006/main'}
with zipfile.ZipFile('[EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT]') as z:
    root = ET.fromstring(z.read('xl/worksheets/sheet2.xml'))
    for ref in ['H4','I4','K4','H5','I5','K5','H6','I6','K6','H7','I7','K7']:
        c = root.find(f".//a:c[@r='{ref}']", ns)
        f = c.find('a:f', ns)
        v = c.find('a:v', ns)
        print(ref, c.attrib.get('t'), f.text if f is not None else None, v.text if v is not None else None)
PY

task: Flagship expert task: LNG Terminal Boil-Off Gas Compressor Allocation Review. Reality context: an LNG terminal has one compressor offline and must allocate boil-off gas between reliquefaction, sendout, and flare minimization. Embedded packet: tanks: T1 bog_t_h=6.2 pressure_kPa=18.4, T2 bog=5.1 pressure=17.9, T3 bog=4.7 pressure=16.8; compressor_capacity_t_h=10.5; sendout_fuel_use_t_h=2.2; flare_limit_t_h=1.0; pressure_warn>18.0; options reduce_unloading 20pct cuts_bog 2.5, rent_mobile_comp cost=78000 adds_capacity=3.0. Rules and constraints: Compute BOG balance, flare risk, pressure risk, and recommend operating mode under constraints. Required work: deliver lng_bog_allocation.xlsx + terminal_ops_memo.md. The deliverables must include formulas or executable logic, intermediate calculations, row-level citations to the embedded packet, validation checks, uncertainty notes, sensitivity checks around the controlling thresholds, and a final decision table with pass/warn/fail/needs_review labels. Use only the embedded packet. Do not import external data, invent missing values, or hide unresolved assumptions.
